title: gbrain #813: git submodule flag placement
summary: For gbrain issue 813 / PR 818, git accepts no recurse submodules as a clone/pull subcommand option, not as a top level git option. Keep SSRF c config flags before clone/pull, but place subcommand flags after the clone or
body:
For gbrain issue #813 / PR #818, git accepts --no-recurse-submodules as a clone/pull subcommand option, not as a top-level git option. Keep SSRF -c config flags before clone/pull, but place subcommand flags after the clone or pull verb. Regression tests belong in test/git-remote.test.ts against the fake-git argv shape.
Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/813 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/818. Changed src/core/git-remote.ts and test/git-remote.test.ts. Local targeted test passed: bun test test/git-remote.test.ts, 37 pass 0 fail.
Verified by: git CLI flag checks plus bun test test/git-remote.test.ts
